programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: After getting divorced, a couple decides to get back together and do things different with the perfect house in Houston; she wants a place that's completely move-in-ready; he thinks their relationship is strong enough to handle some projects.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A California couple look to relocate for his job, so they search for a home in Richmond, Va.; she wants to buy one of the area's vintage charmers, but he's more practical-minded and thinks newer is better.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A single woman leaves behind her city life in Brooklyn, N.Y., for the affordability of Knoxville, Tenn.; she's dreaming of a vintage home with character, but her sister is along to keep her from looking past the real concerns of an old home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: Two picky parents look for a larger home with space for their two kids and rescue pup in Alabama; they find themselves outbid and stuck in real estate purgatory, which is partly due to their struggle to compromise.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: In for the Long Haul on Long Island
programme.desc: A couple is ready to take their relationship to the next level, so they search for a home to share on Long Island, N.Y.; he's looking to buy an old fixer, but she wants to spend their max on something turnkey that's near her mom.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: A Bear of a House Hunt
programme.desc: A Florida couple sold their home faster than expected, and now they're in a hurry find a new place in Sarasota. One's looking for turnkey at under a million, but the other wants to spend more on something that will give them the best return.

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.desc: After shedding their restrictive religious past in Utah, a couple's ready to start fresh in Rincón, Puerto Rico; they're hunting for a fantasy home to serve as their personal paradise where they can unleash the passions they've always kept hidden.

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.desc: A couple has quit their jobs, sold their house, and they're ready to leave the rat race for St. Thomas, Virgin Islands; one has champagne taste and is out to splurge, but the other is budget-conscious and wants to put a cork in the spending.

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.desc: A couple that owns two wedding venues in Texas are ready to find a Bahamian vacation home on the island of Eleuthera; after years of hosting everyone else's happily-ever-afters, they're taking a timeout to find a home for their own love story.

programme.title: Bachelor Mansion Takeover
programme.desc: Former Bachelors and Bachelorettes come together to upgrade the Bachelor Mansion's most iconic space, the pool! Two teams battle to create the ultimate poolside oasis and wellness retreat. And as tension grows, everyone's pushed to the max.

programme.title: Married to Real Estate
programme.desc: Newlyweds look to start their lives together in a Craftsman style home in Atlanta; when it comes to design, they're total opposites, but the great task for Egypt and Mike is to create a designated space for storing and cooking his quality meats.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Married to Real Estate
programme.desc: For over a year, a couple raising a toddler have searched for their dream home; they turn to Egypt and Mike for help; Egypt finds the perfect place and is tasked with adding lots of color throughout the home to create a vibrant design style.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Married to Real Estate
programme.desc: Clark Atlanta University calls on Egypt and Mike to renovate the president's box at their football stadium for homecoming; the space is vital for impressing donors, and with only three weeks, Egypt and Mike must deliver.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Married to Real Estate
programme.desc: A couple's ready to transform their traditional townhome into something that suits the whole family; they're turning to Egypt and Mike to update their kitchen, living room and primary bath, and to also add a bedroom to the first floor.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: Mina and Karen are back in Fountain Square with a quaint but expensive cottage; in order to list this pricey property high enough to make a profit, they must figure out how to add plenty of bells and whistles without losing its vintage charm.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: In Near Eastside, Mina and Karen hope a two-story addition with an Americana cottage design will turn a heftier profit than the area's last project; after finding a series of mysterious holes, the team worries the home will become a money pit.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: Mina and Karen take a risk and purchase a huge house in a relatively new neighborhood; with one budget-busting issue after another, the team has to make money-saving design choices to create a neutral home that still has bombshell appeal.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programme.desc: A couple love their 1905 Victorian house, but its layout makes most of their rooms feel small; attempting to preserve the home's beloved historic charm, Dave and Jenny completely open up the floor plan to update the storybook cottage.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programme.desc: A couple who love the midcentury modern style thought buying a 1970s home made sense, but a pile of renovation projects has them calling for help; Dave and Jenny get to work, bringing their groovy pad and pool house back to its former glory.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programme.sub-title: First Home Gets a Modern Makeover
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny help a mother and son compromise on a renovation plan suitable for his first home, while also getting the most out of her investment.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny race to create an accessible home renovation for an adult daughter with special needs who thrives best at home; with urgency high to renovate quickly, the Marrs also find time to celebrate 20 years of marriage by renewing their vows.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny purchase an '80s rancher in an up-and-coming neighborhood to turn it into an amazing rental property; with their own money on the line, the Marrs are up against a tight budget and timeline as they push toward their open house.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Renovation Aloha
programme.desc: After a friend brings a deal in exchange for a 50/50 partnership, the Kalamas take on a 4,000-square-foot A-frame overlooking Pearl Harbor. But when surprise design upgrades are added mid-reno, finances and friendships are put to the test.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Renovation Aloha
programme.desc: When the Kalamas take on a roach-infested Manoa fixer, they think they've scored big, until demo reveals plumbing disasters, termite damage and a budget-busting surprise; to save the flip, they bet on a secondary suite and a smart backyard reset.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Renovation Aloha
programme.desc: When Kamohai and Tristyn buy a family home from Kamohai's cousin, they're torn between honoring generations of Kalama legacy and making the numbers work.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Something for Mom: Italy and France
programme.desc: A mother's love is unconditional, and these travelers are heading to Italy and France in hopes of showing their gratitude. But adjusting to a new country isn't easy, especially when their real focus is finding the perfect gift for Mom.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: A Family Fight in Mexico's Yucatán
programme.desc: A family gives up their semi-nomadic life of travel to plant roots in Mexico's Yucatán. He dreams of a quiet beach life while mom and daughter prefer to be closer to the city, so they may struggle to find a place where no one has to settle.

programme.desc: Jenn saves a ton of cash by deciding not to paint a couple's kitchen cabinets, but she soon finds that working with a color she didn't choose isn't as easy as it looks; meanwhile, Jenn helps a young family.

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.sub-title: Long Distance DMs to Jacó Dreams
programme.desc: After a DM slide and just one week together, a Canadian is selling everything to relocate and reignite a romance in Jacó, Costa Rica. They're buying a home and working together, he's betting his life savings on a relationship that's yet to be tested.

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.desc: A couple that owns two wedding venues in Texas are ready to find a Bahamian vacation home on the island of Eleuthera; after years of hosting everyone else's happily-ever-afters, they're taking a timeout to find a home for their own love story.

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.desc: After living on their boat for four years, a couple's ready to buy a home on the Caribbean island of Bonaire; they want to start a charter business with their catamaran, but they may have to sell their beloved Texas home.

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.desc: After shedding their restrictive religious past in Utah, a couple's ready to start fresh in Rincón, Puerto Rico; they're hunting for a fantasy home to serve as their personal paradise where they can unleash the passions they've always kept hidden.

programme.title: Zillow Gone Wild
programme.desc: Jack McBrayer is back on the road to find wild homes around; he kicks things off at a house with a 727 airplane inside, and later, he explores a pink time capsule-esque penthouse.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: For someone who rarely plays the lottery, a single dad strikes it lucky when a scratcher wins him $10 million; after taking care of his loved ones, he turns to David to find a family dream home with a sparkling pool in Visalia, Calif.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A couple got married in Hawaii 18 years ago, and after winning $5 million on a scratcher, they're moving to the Big Island; with a huge budget, David searches for properties with ocean views, and takes in the Big Kona energy along the way.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A couple missed winning a $1.6 billion jackpot by one number, but they did have all the numbers to win $1 million dollars; now, they're calling on David to help realize their dream of owning a mountain lodge in the forests of New Hampshire.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Connecticut teachers struck it lucky just when they are ready to retire; David helps realize their dream of finding a forever home in the beach loving, low country of South Carolina where there is lots of water, boating and scenery.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home

programme.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programme.desc: Deep in the French countryside, a local expert helps a mother and daughter duo hunt bargain properties in Carcassonne; mom's looking to start a new life in a beautiful home and the search includes medieval castles, antique fairs, and some fine cheese.

programme.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programme.desc: On the Italian island of Sicily, a local guide takes a couple on a unique tour of the sizzling local traditions as they explore affordable and dreamy homes.
